title: senecio fremontii subsp. occidentalis
intro: Senecio fremontii subsp. occidentalis, also known as Fremont's ragwort or Fremont's greenthread, is a plant species that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, as well as reduce swelling and pain. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Senecio fremontii subsp. occidentalis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used in herbal medicine to leverage its medicinal properties.
